normalization: min-max 0-1 per dimension across all tracts in dataset
limitations: USDA FARA 2019 vintage — food access proxy used from ACS poverty+income thresholds
CDC PLACES 2023 — crude prevalence estimates, not direct measurement
D4 health imputed to 0 where CDC data unavailable (conservative)
Food desert proxy: poverty_rate>=20 AND median_hh_income<=65000 (documented ACS approximation)
Dataset covers 50 metropolitan counties — not a national sample
FARA direct download unavailable — ACS poverty proxy substituted and labeled
Equal weights are a v1 baseline — alternative weightings should be tested
cities_note: 50 cities confirmed by row count in processed/farmblock_city_rankings.csv (authoritative)
